The user reading the code the agent (see [[Agent]]) produced and forming a judgement on it. Reading the diff or the changed files counts; reading the agent's *description* of what it did does not — narration is not the artifact.

*Avoid:* "code review" alone — ambiguous between human and automated (see [[Automated review]]).

*Usage:* "I human-reviewed the AFK output." "You read the diff or just the summary?" "Diff. The summary said it deleted dead code — turned out the function was called from a generated file."
